message:
test: add cross-module integration test for connector reliability → DLQ

Chains ConnectorReliabilityController (circuit breaker + auto-DLQ),
ConnectorErrorKind (error classification drives breaker/retry decisions),
DeadLetterQueue (failed action queuing and replay), and ReplayPlan
(batch retry scheduling). 5 tests covering error-kind-driven breaker
and DLQ behavior, replay plan lifecycle, telemetry coherence, circuit
preset tolerance differences, and full operate-fail-recover-replay flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
